testcase.name: contextLoads

testcase.system-out:
15:48:57.741 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.karur.realty_management_application.RealtyManagementApplicationTests]: RealtyManagementApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 15:48:57.844 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.karur.realty_management_application.RealtyManagementApplication for test class com.karur.realty_management_application.RealtyManagementApplicationTests 15:48:57.930 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.karur.realty_management_application.RealtyManagementApplicationTests]: RealtyManagementApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 15:48:57.932 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.karur.realty_management_application.RealtyManagementApplication for test class com.karur.realty_management_application.RealtyManagementApplicationTests

2026-07-17T15:48:58.402+05:30 INFO 15376 --- [realty-management-application] [ main] c.k.r.RealtyManagementApplicationTests : Starting RealtyManagementApplicationTests using Java 17.0.13 with PID 15376 (started by gunitha in /home/gunitha/Desktop/programming/deployment/realty-management-application) 2026-07-17T15:48:58.406+05:30 INFO 15376 --- [realty-management-application] [ main] c.k.r.RealtyManagementApplicationTests : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-07-17T15:48:58.990+05:30 INFO 15376 --- [realty-management-application] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Bootstrapping Spring Data R2DBC repositories in DEFAULT mode. 2026-07-17T15:48:59.009+05:30 INFO 15376 --- [realty-management-application] [ main] .s.d.r.c.RepositoryConfigurationDelegate : Finished Spring Data repository scanning in 10 ms. Found 0 R2DBC repository interfaces. 2026-07-17T15:48:59.632+05:30 WARN 15376 --- [realty-management-application] [ main] c.r.GenericReactiveWebApplicationContext : Exception encountered during context initialization - cancelling refresh attempt: org.springframework.beans.factory.BeanCreationException: Error creating bean with name 'connectionFactory' defined in class path resource [org/springframework/boot/r2dbc/autoconfigure/ConnectionFactoryConfigurations$PoolConfiguration$PooledConnectionFactoryConfiguration.class]: Failed to instantiate [io.r2dbc.pool.ConnectionPool]: Factory method 'connectionFactory' threw exception with message: Failed to determine a suitable R2DBC Connection URL 2026-07-17T15:48:59.646+05:30 INFO 15376 --- [realty-management-application] [ main] .s.b.a.l.ConditionEvaluationReportLogger :
Error starting ApplicationContext. To display the condition evaluation report re-run your application with 'debug' enabled. 2026-07-17T15:48:59.663+05:30 ERROR 15376 --- [realty-management-application] [ main] o.s.b.d.LoggingFailureAnalysisReporter :
*************************** APPLICATION FAILED TO START ***************************
Description:
Failed to configure a ConnectionFactory: 'url' attribute is not specified and no embedded database could be configured.
Reason: Failed to determine a suitable R2DBC Connection URL
Action:
Consider the following: If you want an embedded database (H2), please put it on the classpath. If you have database settings to be loaded from a particular profile you may need to activate it (no profiles are currently active).
